def: A charge for withdrawing cash against your credit card limit, often with a higher interest rate and no grace period. Interest accrues immediately.
avoid: Never use credit cards for cash advances; use a debit card or personal loan instead.

def: An administrative charge assessed when modifying the scope of work in a construction, renovation, or service contract after the agreement has been signed.
avoid: Get all change orders in writing with pricing before work begins; bundle multiple changes into a single order to reduce per-change costs.

def: A fee added to cover costs of meeting regulatory or legal compliance requirements, often passed to consumers as a line item.
avoid: Ask providers to explain what specific regulations the fee covers; compare providers with lower compliance charges.

def: A charge for the privilege of paying a bill by credit card, online, or over the phone rather than by cash or check.
avoid: Pay by ACH transfer or paper check to avoid convenience fees; ask if the fee can be waived.

def: An optional insurance product sold alongside loans that pays the loan balance if the borrower dies, becomes disabled, or loses their job. Often high-cost with limited benefit.
industry: Auto Loans, Personal Loans, Credit Cards
avoid: Decline all credit insurance products; buy term life or disability insurance separately at better rates.
